channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/3/2)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的信息流里，关于 AI 和编程工具的内容特别多，感觉整个社区都在热烈讨论怎么用 AI 来提升开发效率。我帮你挑出了几件最值得你关注的事：首先是几个新的开源 AI Agent 项目，看起来在易用性和功能上都有新想法；然后是关于 Claude Code 和 OpenCode 的实用讨论，很多开发者都在分享自己的使用心得和踩坑经验；最后，还有几篇关于如何将 AI 深度融入工作流的深度分享，非常实在。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的信息流里，关于 AI 和编程工具的内容特别多，感觉整个社区都在热烈讨论怎么用 AI 来提升开发效率。我帮你挑出了几件最值得你关注的事：首先是几个新的开源 AI Agent 项目，看起来在易用性和功能上都有新想法；然后是关于 Claude Code 和 OpenCode 的实用讨论，很多开发者都在分享自己的使用心得和踩坑经验；最后，还有几篇关于如何将 AI 深度融入工作流的深度分享，非常实在。

item.title: RightNow-AI/openfang
item.description: Open-source Agent Operating System | 近期热门 | 总 7788 stars
item.author: RightNow-AI

item.title: agentscope-ai/CoPaw
item.description: Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities. | 近期热门 | 总 3657 stars
item.author: agentscope-ai

item.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
item.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. | 近期热门 | 总 3510 stars
item.author: Panniantong

item.title: ForLoopCodes/contextplus
item.description: Semantic Intelligence for Large-Scale Engineering. Context+ is an MCP server designed for developers who demand 99% accuracy. By combining Tree-sitter AST parsing, Spectral Clustering, and Obsidian-style linking, Context+ turns a massive codebase into a searchable, hierarchical feature graph. | 近期热门 | 总 1083 stars
item.author: ForLoopCodes

item.title: win4r/memory-lancedb-pro
item.description: Enhanced LanceDB memory plugin for OpenClaw — Hybrid Retrieval (Vector + BM25), Cross-Encoder Rerank, Multi-Scope Isolation, Management CLI | 近期热门 | 总 771 stars
item.author: win4r

item.title: 3DCF-Labs/safepilot
item.description: AI assistant that executes real work, safely. | 近期热门 | 总 378 stars
item.author: 3DCF-Labs

item.title: geekjourneyx/jina-cli
item.description: A lightweight CLI tool wrapping Jina AI Reader API for AI Agents. Fetch and parse any URL into LLM-friendly formats (Markdown/Text/HTML). Perfect for reading X(Twitter), blogs, and news sites. | 近期热门 | 总 154 stars
item.author: geekjourneyx

item.title: siewers/shield-commander
item.description: A desktop app for managing NVIDIA Shield devices over ADB — monitor processes, install/uninstall apps, and view system details | 近期热门 | 总 30 stars
item.author: siewers

item.title: lyimoexiao/komari-theme-naive
item.description: 基于 Vue 3 + Vite + UnoCSS + Naive UI 的 Komari 主题 | 近期热门 | 总 28 stars
item.author: lyimoexiao

item.title: OpenAI WebSocket Mode for Responses API - 持久化AI代理。速度提升高达40%。
item.author: OpenAI WebSocket Mode for Responses API
